session_note: S104 - TD Playability + Unified In-Game Codex. Owner playtest report: (1) turret combo didn't work vs-bots; (2) chewer structure stops at 2, should produce ~1/15s continuously; (3) chewers make no chewing sound; (4) ONE in-game CODEX (G+C chord) with 3 tabs GODLY COMBOS/COMBOS/TOWERS&STRUCTURES showing how-to-build, unlock-gated, remove startup COMBOS button. Plus carry-forward (register PENTAGRAM_RECIPE, recipe-build hint, P5 Tier-1 G4 juice). Owner: 'do all of that this session and the carry forward ... work thoroughly and methodically ... highest quality' = unlock_source:user. FULL tier; 3-lens adversarial council (determinism/gameplay/architecture) ADOPT-WITH-FIXES + PRIME-AUDIT. PDR: .claude/plans/2026-06-25_PDR_Session_104_TD_Playability_Unified_Codex.md
council_result: 3-lens adversarial deliberation (DETERMINISM/REPLAY, GAMEPLAY/BALANCE, ARCHITECTURE/PERF/WIRE) on the S104 batch. Verdict ADOPT-WITH-FIXES. Must-fixes: D1 re-baseline chewer-present golden replays (2-seed each) + keep no-chewer/Voltkin-only replays byte-identical; D2 trace `persistent` flag semantics before changing chewer lifetimeTicks (keep despawn tick-pure + green-goo VFX + targeting unchanged); D3 bot spawner construction deterministic (seeded RNG, computed pentagram ring, fixed draw order); G1 gate bot-spawner on difficulty (no beginner swarm-stomp); A1 CHEWER_MAX_GLOBAL 8->16 = sanctioned playtest raise (orig design 14) + note 1v1 wire cost (delta-encode later if perf degrades); A2 keep unified codex overlay LAZY (off the 750 KiB entry chunk) + G+C chord in main.ts not controls.ts. Tuning defaults: chewer lifetimeTicks=3600 (60s), CHEWER_MAX_PER_SPAWNER=5, CHEWER_MAX_GLOBAL=16 (owner retunes by feel). PRIME-AUDIT boot-then-smoke: (1) bot pentagram -> enemy chewers -> player Line+7-Spiral turret beams+kills; (2) spawner emits ~1/15s continuously + audible gnaw per chewing chewer; (3) G+C opens 3-tab codex, locked-until-unlocked, build-a-turret unlocks its tile; (4) ONE startup CODEX button; (5) determinism gate GREEN on new baselines + build under cap. NOTE: a parallel 3-way workflow council (Opus reviewers) was launched as a cross-check; ran slow in-env, supervisor (Opus) deliberation used in its place; fold synthesis if it lands.

priorities.label: S104 P1 - Chewer continuous production + audible chewing: finite chewer lifetime (churn) reconciled with the persistent despawn gate; raise CHEWER_MAX_PER_SPAWNER 2->4 + CHEWER_MAX_GLOBAL 8->12; render-driven chewing-loop SFX (per-creature debounced, host+client, zero wire); re-baseline chewer-present goldens (2-seed).
priorities.check_method: S104 P1 DONE (6f9f763, push batched to session end). Gates: tsc 0; vitest 1646/1646 (+2 new: churn-drain determinism gate + the rewritten chewer-finite-lifetime contract); build entry 594.9/750 KiB (155.1 headroom). Council M1-M7 folded: M1 CHEWER_CONFIG persistent:true->false + lifetimeTicks 1e9->3000 (reuses the !config.persistent Voltkin DESPAWNING->auto-delete FSM — NO new branch; the no-op-config-tweak trap avoided) so the swarm churns + the spawner keeps producing past 2. M2 rewrote BOTH old-contract tests (towerDefense.test.ts 'persistent chewer does NOT despawn' -> 'enters DESPAWNING then auto-deletes'; voltkin-config.test.ts persistent toBe(true)->false+lifetime 3000). M3 chewing SFX is RENDER-DRIVEN in chewerRenderer keyed on the WIRED state==='ATTACKING' + ticksInState bite-buckets (chewProgress is STRIPPED from the client mirror per save.ts:736 — verified; never wall-clock cadence) so host AND 1v1 joiner both hear it; removed the redundant host-local CHEW_BITE audio drain (kept the BOND_SEVERED final-crunch + the CHEW_BITE visual). M4 voice-cap MAX_GNAW_VOICES=3/frame. M5 caps 4/12 (NOT 5/16 — finite lifetime is the real fix; 18 left as documented post-playtest ceiling) + steady_state=lifetime/interval comment. M6 added a 2-seed churn gate that drives a swarm past lifetime (drains to 0, count drops) so the despawn path is EXERCISED in-gate. M7 re-derived the 16KB wire-budget test at 12 chewers + rewrote stale per-creature wire-cost comments. Lifetime-expiry FADES via DESPAWNING (death-watcher reserves green-goo for KILLS = non-DESPAWNING vanish, mirroring creatureRenderer). M8 verified a FALSE alarm: spawners form via the hardcoded findAllPentagramAnchors path, not the recipe registry, so PENTAGRAM_RECIPE being unregistered does NOT break chewer production (deferred to P4 for the codex tile). NOTE: runtime playtest is owner's (WebGL rAF game can't be screenshot by the harness — project-established); boot-smoke at session end.
priorities.objective: Spawner produces a chewer ~every 15s continuously (no hard stop at 2) and every actively-chewing chewer is audible on host + client. Replay determinism preserved (re-baselined chewer goldens 2-seed; no-chewer replays byte-identical).
priorities.scope: src/constants.ts (CHEWER_MAX_PER_SPAWNER 2->5, CHEWER_MAX_GLOBAL 8->16); src/state/creatures/voltkin-config.ts (chewer lifetimeTicks finite) + creatureLifecycle.ts (reconcile persistent despawn gate, tick-pure); src/render/chewerRenderer.ts + audioManager (render-driven chewing-loop SFX, per-creature debounce); src/state/save.replay.test.ts + golden snapshots (re-baseline chewer-present).
priorities.testing: tsc 0; full vitest green; chewer despawns at finite lifetime (tick-pure) with green-goo; spawner keeps emitting past 2 (cap 5 concurrent, global 16); chewing chewer triggers gnaw on cadence (render); chewer-present goldens re-recorded 2-seed byte-identical; no-chewer/Voltkin-only replays unchanged; build < 750 KiB.

priorities.label: S104 P2 - vs-bots TD playability: bot constructs a chewer spawner (deterministic pentagram ring, seeded, difficulty-gated) so ENEMY chewers exist and the player's turret/HELGA/Voltkin visibly work in vs-bots.
priorities.objective: In vs-bots, a medium+ bot builds a working pentagram chewer-spawner so the player can build a turret and watch it kill the bot's chewers. Deterministic + replay-safe.
priorities.scope: src/bots/botBrain.ts (BUILD_SPAWNER goal + ring-position computation), botController.ts (actuation), botConfig.ts (difficulty gate flag).
priorities.testing: tsc 0; vitest green; bot forms the exact pentagram recipe -> REGISTER_SPAWNER ignites -> enemy chewers emit; 2-seed determinism on the bot spawner build; beginner bot does NOT build one.

priorities.label: S104 P3 - Unified in-game CODEX: one lazy tabbed overlay (GODLY COMBOS/COMBOS/TOWERS&STRUCTURES) with how-to-build per entry, unlock-gated; unlock-on-build for spawner/defender; G+C chord in main.ts; startup keeps ONE CODEX button (remove COMBOS).
priorities.objective: A single in-game codex (G+C) with 3 unlock-gated tabs showing how to build each godly/combo/tower; building a tower/spawner unlocks its tile; startup has one CODEX button.
priorities.scope: src/render/ new unifiedCodexOverlay.ts (merges codexOverlay + comboCodexOverlay), codexStore.ts (tower unlock helpers), src/state/godlyOrchestration.ts (unlock-on-build host) + render-loop mirror; src/main.ts (G+C chord pressed-set + lazy open + render-loop unlock mirror); src/render/titleScreen.ts (remove COMBOS button, single CODEX).
priorities.testing: tsc 0; vitest green; chord decision pure-fn (G+C only, guarded); 3 tabs render correct data; locked-until-unlocked; build-a-turret unlocks tile (host+client); ONE startup button; overlay stays lazy (entry < 750 KiB).
